title: helianthemum oelandicum subsp. rupifragum
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. rupifragum, also known as Swedish rockrose or Swedish heath, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rockrose family (Cistaceae). The medicinal properties of Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. rupifragum include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. The herbal preparations of Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. rupifragum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat conditions such as skin irritations, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
